case_title: REYES, LYNN VS AMERICAN AIRPORTER SHUTTLE C/O PHILLIP ACHILISOS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,214.50 FILED BY REYES, LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRPORTER SHUTTLE  C/O PHILLIP ACHILISOS PEACOCK, WAYNE DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
